text:
The is one of several families that live within the Walls. It is the family that Petra Rall of the Special Operation Squad hailed from.

Story

Eve of the Counterattack arc

Petra Rall is first introduced as a member of the Levi Squad.

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

She later participates in the 57th expedition outside the Walls where she is killed while battling the Female Titan. 

When the Scout Regiment return to Calaneth District, Petra's father approaches Captain Levi to discuss with him about a letter his daughter sent him. Petra's father speaks of Petra's wish to devote herself to Levi and puts the emphasis on his own worry as a father.
